_comment: Feedback rules keyed by domain > score_band > dimension. 7 domains x 5 bands x 5 dimensions = 175 rules.

skill_alignment.feedback: Your technical skills closely match the JD. Ensure listed versions match exactly (e.g. Python 3.11, React 18).
skill_alignment.fresher_variant: Your project skills closely match the JD. Mention specific versions of tools you used in your projects.

keyword_coverage.feedback: Strong keyword overlap detected. Double-check that niche tools mentioned in the JD are present on your resume.
keyword_coverage.fresher_variant: Good keyword match. Verify that all tools from your coursework and projects are listed.

semantic_contextual_fit.feedback: Your experience context is well-aligned. Highlight your most impactful recent contribution.
semantic_contextual_fit.fresher_variant: Your project context aligns well. Highlight the most technically challenging project you completed.

achievement_impact.feedback: Quantify your top achievements further — aim for 3+ data-backed bullet points.
achievement_impact.fresher_variant: Add measurable outcomes from academic projects (e.g. accuracy improvements, users served).

structural_completeness.feedback: Resume structure is solid. Ensure contact info and LinkedIn URL are current.
structural_completeness.fresher_variant: Good structure. Add a GitHub or portfolio link to strengthen your profile.

skill_alignment.feedback: Most core skills are present. Add 2-3 missing secondary skills from the JD to improve alignment.
skill_alignment.fresher_variant: Most core skills match. Add skills from electives or self-study that align with the JD.

keyword_coverage.feedback: Good keyword coverage. Include specific cloud/DevOps terms if the JD mentions CI/CD or infrastructure.
keyword_coverage.fresher_variant: Good coverage. Add relevant tools from tutorials or certifications you have completed.

semantic_contextual_fit.feedback: Context is good but could be stronger. Rewrite 1-2 bullet points to mirror JD phrasing.
semantic_contextual_fit.fresher_variant: Align your project descriptions more closely with the language used in the JD.

achievement_impact.feedback: Add metrics to your remaining bullet points — numbers make achievements concrete.
achievement_impact.fresher_variant: Quantify project outcomes where possible (e.g. dataset size, model accuracy, time saved).

structural_completeness.feedback: Consider adding a brief Summary section if missing to anchor your profile.
structural_completeness.fresher_variant: Add an Objective or Summary statement tailored to this specific role.

skill_alignment.feedback: Add specific programming languages, frameworks, and tools mentioned in the JD (e.g. React, FastAPI, Docker).
skill_alignment.fresher_variant: List all programming languages and frameworks from your coursework and personal projects that match the JD.

semantic_contextual_fit.feedback: Rewrite your experience bullet points using the same terminology as the JD to improve context alignment.
semantic_contextual_fit.fresher_variant: Rewrite your project descriptions using terminology from the JD.

keyword_coverage.feedback: Include JD-specific keywords such as CI/CD, microservices, or cloud platforms in your skills section.
keyword_coverage.fresher_variant: Add relevant technical keywords from the JD to your skills section, even if learned through online courses.

structural_completeness.feedback: Add a dedicated Projects section showcasing relevant technical builds, even if they are academic or personal.
structural_completeness.fresher_variant: Add a Projects section with 2-3 relevant builds from coursework, hackathons, or personal work.

achievement_impact.feedback: Quantify your impact — replace vague statements with metrics (e.g. 'reduced load time by 40%').
achievement_impact.fresher_variant: Add concrete outcomes to project descriptions (e.g. 'achieved 92% accuracy on test set').

skill_alignment.feedback: Your skill set has low overlap with the JD. Focus on adding the top 5 missing technical skills.
skill_alignment.fresher_variant: Focus on learning and listing the top 3 required technologies through online courses or projects.

semantic_contextual_fit.feedback: The overall context of your resume does not align with this role. Tailor the summary and experience sections.
semantic_contextual_fit.fresher_variant: Rewrite your resume objective and project descriptions to specifically target this role.

keyword_coverage.feedback: Many JD keywords are absent from your resume. Run a keyword gap check and incorporate the top missing terms.
keyword_coverage.fresher_variant: Identify the top 5 missing keywords from the JD and build small projects using those technologies.

structural_completeness.feedback: Your resume appears to be missing key sections. Ensure Education, Skills, Projects, and a Summary are all present.
structural_completeness.fresher_variant: Ensure your resume has clear Education, Skills, Projects, and Certifications sections.

achievement_impact.feedback: Your resume lacks outcome-oriented language. Add action verbs and measurable results to every bullet point.
achievement_impact.fresher_variant: Use action verbs (built, designed, implemented) and add measurable results to project descriptions.

skill_alignment.feedback: Very low skill overlap. This role requires a significantly different technical stack than what you currently have.
skill_alignment.fresher_variant: This role requires skills you haven't demonstrated yet. Consider building foundational projects first.

keyword_coverage.feedback: Most required technologies are absent from your resume. Consider upskilling before applying.
keyword_coverage.fresher_variant: Start with online courses or tutorials in the key technologies listed in this JD.

semantic_contextual_fit.feedback: Your background appears to be in a different technical domain. Consider roles closer to your experience.
semantic_contextual_fit.fresher_variant: Your academic background may not align with this role. Look for entry-level positions in your domain.

achievement_impact.feedback: Without relevant achievements, it will be difficult to stand out. Build portfolio projects in the target domain.
achievement_impact.fresher_variant: Build 2-3 portfolio projects using the technologies in this JD before applying.

structural_completeness.feedback: Major resume sections are missing. Create a complete resume with all standard sections before applying.
structural_completeness.fresher_variant: Create a complete resume with Summary, Education, Skills, Projects, and Certifications sections.
